headline: Akamai’s Montana Win Highlights Public Sector Focus And Rich Valuation
summary: Akamai Technologies has been awarded a major data communications contract by the State of Montana. The agreement is designed to streamline government acquisition of Akamai’s security and cloud computing solutions. The contract creates a statewide purchasing vehicle for government and educational institutions across Montana. Akamai Technologies, NasdaqGS:AKAM, is drawing fresh attention after securing this new statewide contract in Montana, adding a public sector angle to a story often...
